items.previous_state: Direct writes without root boundary enforcement.
items.current_state: Writes pass through _ensure_write_path + allowed_write_roots gate bound to repo root.
run_cmd now attempts command gateway first (where IDs exist), then classified read-only fallback.
normalize_verdict enforces PASS/PASS_WITH_WARNINGS/FAIL/BLOCKED for persisted action results.

items.boundary: Executable schema gates on write-critical payloads
items.previous_state: Schemas were present but not executed at write boundaries.
items.current_state: Subset schema validator executes before writing action receipts, run results, owner records, and transfer intents.

items.previous_state: Default smoke performed POST action runs and owner-intent writes.
items.current_state: Default smoke is read-only; mutation routes require explicit --allow-mutation-smoke opt-in.
Some commands still fallback to direct execution when allowlist IDs are unavailable; boundary is explicitly tagged in command result metadata.

items.boundary: Legacy WARN/BLOCK tokens in nested diagnostic detail payloads
items.previous_state: Legacy tokens used both internally and for persisted machine truth.
items.current_state: Top-level persisted verdicts are canonical; some nested detail rows still use historical aliases and should be normalized in a follow-up pass.
